title: Traders Overwhelmed by Iran News Are Turning to AI for Help
description: As Maxence Visseau spent the first few days of the Iran war trying to make sense of what the conflict would mean for markets, he put artificial intelligence at the heart of his investment process.
content:
(Bloomberg) -- As Maxence Visseau spent the first few days of the Iran war trying to make sense of what the conflict would mean for markets, he put artificial intelligence at the heart of his investment process.

title: Rediscovering Happitude in a Restless World
description: Ankit Sharma ankit.cloudnine@gmail.com Every year, 20 March is celebrated as the International Day of Happiness. But in a world running faster than ever before, one question quietly lingers in the background- Are we really becoming happier ? Modern civilization has achieved extraordinary milestones. Nations are competing to dominate global power equations. Economics are expanding, technologies are advancing and the artificial intelligence is rapidly reshaping the future of work and society. Yet somewhere in this race for more, humanity seems to […]

title: Mideast crisis puts Asia's earnings boom to the test
description: Before the Iran war broke out, Asian equities were rallying on the back of an earnings boom driven by artificial intelligence enthusiasm and commodity exports – not domestic consumption. The Middle East conflict is now stress-testing just how exposed that model is.
content: HONG KONG, March 20 (Reuters) - Before the Iran war broke out, Asian equities were rallying on the back of an earnings boom driven by artificial intelligence enthusiasm and commodity exports – not domestic consumption. The Middle East conflict is now... [5237 chars]

title: Megatrends Fuel Asian Earnings Rally Amid Middle East Crisis
description: Asian equities experienced a notable earnings boom driven by artificial intelligence and commodity exports, though reliance on Middle Eastern energy made them vulnerable during the Iran war. This rally was not based on domestic consumption but on global trends, largely impacting technology and materials sectors.
content:
Asian equities were rallying due to an earnings boom driven by artificial intelligence and commodity exports before the Iran war commenced, showcasing the region's vulnerability to energy shocks given its reliance on Middle Eastern resources.
With en... [444 chars]

title: A.I. Is Writing Fiction. Publishers Are Unprepared.
description: Book publishing has few safeguards in place to prevent the unwitting publication of a novel heavily generated by artificial intelligence.
content:
For months, speculation has been building online that a buzzy horror novel, “Shy Girl,” was written with the help of A.I.
The novel, about a desperate young woman who is held hostage by a man she met online and forced to live as his pet, was self-pub... [1488 chars]

title: High-Stakes Allegations: U.S. AI Tech Conspiracy Unveiled
description: The U.S. Justice Department has charged three individuals with conspiring to unlawfully divert U.S. artificial intelligence technology to China. The accused allegedly attempted to sell AI servers with sensitive Nvidia GPUs in violation of export laws. The indictment was revealed in a Manhattan federal court.
content:
In a major legal development, the U.S. Justice Department announced charges against three individuals accused of a conspiracy to redirect American artificial intelligence technology to China.
The suspects, Yih-Shyan Liaw, Ruei-Tsang Chang, and Ting-W... [400 chars]

title: US Charges Three People With Plot to Illegally Send AI Tech to China
description: A member of Super Micro Computer Inc.’s board was among three people indicted for allegedly plotting to divert billions of dollars’ worth of artificial intelligence technology from the California based company to China.
